title: NightWhispers Zone View-Layer Schema v1
description: Zone projection over invariant bundles and Seed contracts. Read-only view; constructed at runtime via H.zone_view(). No raw horror content.

id.description: Stable Zone identifier; aligns with registry/zones.json

region_id.description: Primary region key for Black-Archivum bundle resolution

tile_ids.description: Optional fine-grained tile anchors for sub-region invariant resolution

invariant_ref.description: git@ URI to canonical invariant bundle in Black-Archivum

fog.description: Environmental occlusion driver; influences UEC, STCI

rain.description: Sensory interference driver; influences UEC, EMD

light.description: Safety contrast driver; influences STCI, CDL

rumor_intensity.description: Direct input to rumor weight and ARR; influences CIC, UEC

rumor_bias_tags.description: Tags that bias RumorPool seeding toward compatible invariant profiles

target_arousal.description: Lab prior for target arousal; validated by Neural-Resonance-Lab

target_valence.description: Lab prior for target valence; validated by Neural-Resonance-Lab

artifact_sensitivity.description: Weight for EEG artifact rejection in BCI processing
